channel.title: GH AI早报
channel.description: AI 资讯早报，每日更新 AI 领域最新动态

item.title: 2026-03-15 AI早报
item.description: 2026-03-15 AI早报 📅 2026-03-15 | 自动抓取自各大 AI 资讯源 ⏰ 更新时间: 2026-03-15 03:57:44 📰 今日要闻 1. Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex 属性 内容 📅 时间 2026-03-11 🏷️ 来源 OpenAI Blog 💬 Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks. 2. Designing A…
item.content:encoded:
2026-03-15 AI早报

📅 2026-03-15 | 自动抓取自各大 AI 资讯源 ⏰ 更新时间: 2026-03-15 03:57:44

📰 今日要闻

1. Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex

属性 内容
📅 时间 2026-03-11
🏷️ 来源 OpenAI Blog

💬 Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.

2. Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection

属性 内容
📅 时间 2026-03-11
🏷️ 来源 OpenAI Blog

💬 How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows.

3. Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI

属性 内容
📅 时间 2026-03-11
🏷️ 来源 OpenAI Blog

💬 Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.

4. How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia

属性 内容
📅 时间 2026-03-12
🏷️ 来源 Google AI Blog
👤 作者 John Gillman

💬 A doctor is sitting across a desk from a patient. The doctor is holding a tablet and a pen. Medical charts renderings are in the background.

5. Gemini in Google Sheets just achieved state-of-the-art performance.

属性 内容
📅 时间 2026-03-10
🏷️ 来源 Google AI Blog
👤 作者 Eric Birnbaum

💬 Today we announced new beta features for Gemini in Sheets to help you create, organize and edit entire sheets, from basic tasks to complex data analysis — just describe …

6. How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation

属性 内容
📅 时间 2026-03-06
🏷️ 来源 Google AI Blog
👤 作者 Dan Morris

💬 Photos of animals being identified by the SpeciesNet AI model

7. Beyond Semantic Similarity: Introducing NVIDIA NeMo Retriever’s Generalizable Agentic Retrieval Pipeline

属性 内容
📅 时间 2026-03-13
🏷️ 来源 Hugging Face Blog

8. Introducing Storage Buckets on the Hugging Face Hub

属性 内容
📅 时间 2026-03-10
🏷️ 来源 Hugging Face Blog

9. Keep the Tokens Flowing: Lessons from 16 Open-Source RL Libraries

属性 内容
📅 时间 2026-03-10
🏷️ 来源 Hugging Face Blog

10. Why physical AI is becoming manufacturing’s next advantage

属性 内容
📅 时间 2026-03-13
🏷️ 来源 MIT Technology Review
👤 作者 Dayan Rodriguez

💬 For decades, manufacturers have pursued automation to drive efficiency, reduce costs, and stabilize operations. That approach delivered meaningful gains, but it is no longer enough. Today’s manufacturing leaders face a different challenge: how to grow amid labor constraints, rising complexity, and i

11. The Download: how AI is used for military targeting, and the Pentagon’s war on Claude

属性 内容
📅 时间 2026-03-13
🏷️ 来源 MIT Technology Review
👤 作者 Thomas Macaulay

💬 This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Defense official reveals how AI chatbots could be used for targeting decisions  The US military might use generative AI systems to rank targ

12. Future AI chips could be built on glass

属性 内容
📅 时间 2026-03-13
🏷️ 来源 MIT Technology Review
👤 作者 Jeremy Hsu

💬 Human-made glass is thousands of years old. But it’s now poised to find its way into the AI chips used in the world’s newest and largest data centers. This year, a South Korean company called Absolics is planning to start commercial production of special glass panels designed to make next-generation

🔥 开源项目推荐

1. volcengine/OpenViking

属性 内容
🔧 语言 Python
⭐ Stars 10,802
📈 今日 1,610 stars today

📝 OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

2. anthropics/claude-plugins-official

属性 内容
🔧 语言 Python
⭐ Stars 11,403
📈 今日 411 stars today

📝 Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.

3. langflow-ai/openrag

属性 内容
🔧 语言 Python
⭐ Stars 2,769
📈 今日 564 stars today

📝 OpenRAG is a comprehensive, single package Retrieval-Augmented Generation platform built on Langflow, Docling, and Opensearch.

4. lightpanda-io/browser

属性 内容
🔧 语言 Zig
⭐ Stars 17,254
📈 今日 2,069 stars today

📝 Lightpanda: the headless browser designed for AI and automation

5. msitarzewski/agency-agents

属性 内容
🔧 语言 Shell
⭐ Stars 44,122
📈 今日 4,280 stars today

📝 A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

📬 订阅方式

方式 链接
RSS 订阅 订阅
GitHub Issues 查看
Markdown 备份 BACKUP

📊 数据来源

AI 资讯

来源 链接

Anthropic Blog 官网
Hugging Face Blog 官网

来源 链接

2026-03-15 AI早报

📅 2026-03-15 | 自动抓取自各大 AI 资讯源 ⏰ 更新时间: 2026-03-15 02:36:52

📰 今日要闻

1. Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex

属性 内容
📅 时间 2026-03-11
🏷️ 来源 OpenAI Blog

💬 Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.

2. Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection

属性 内容
📅 时间 2026-03-11
🏷️ 来源 OpenAI Blog

💬 How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows.

3. Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI

属性 内容
📅 时间 2026-03-11
🏷️ 来源 OpenAI Blog

💬 Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.

🏷️ 来源 Google AI Blog
👤 作者 John Gillman

💬 A doctor is sitting across a desk from a patient. The doctor is holding a tablet and a pen. Medical charts renderings are in the background.

👤 作者 Eric Birnbaum

💬 Today we announced new beta features for Gemini in Sheets to help you create, organize and edit entire sheets, from basic tasks to complex data analysis — just describe …

💬 Photos of animals being identified by the SpeciesNet AI model

属性 内容

属性 内容

10. Why physical AI is becoming manufacturing’s next advantage

📅 时间 2026-03-13

👤 作者 Dayan Rodriguez

💬 For decades, manufacturers have pursued automation to drive efficiency, reduce costs, and stabilize operations. That approach delivered meaningful gains, but it is no longer enough. Today’s manufacturing leaders face a different challenge: how to grow amid labor constraints, rising complexity, and i

属性 内容
📅 时间 2026-03-13
🏷️ 来源 MIT Technology Review
👤 作者 Thomas Macaulay

💬 This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Defense official reveals how AI chatbots could be used for targeting decisions  The US military might use generative AI systems to rank targ

12. Future AI chips could be built on glass

属性 内容
📅 时间 2026-03-13
🏷️ 来源 MIT Technology Review
👤 作者 Jeremy Hsu

💬 Human-made glass is thousands of years old. But it’s now poised to find its way into the AI chips used in the world’s newest and largest data centers. This year, a South Korean company called Absolics is planning to start commercial production of special glass panels designed to make next-generation

🔥 开源项目推荐

1. volcengine/OpenViking

属性 内容
🔧 语言 Python
⭐ Stars 10,710
📈 今日 1,610 stars today

📝 OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

⭐ Stars 11,362

⭐ Stars 2,738

item.title: 2026-03-15 AI早报
item.description: 今日要闻 📅 2026-03-15 | 自动抓取自各大 AI 资讯源 1. Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex 来源: OpenAI Blog 2. Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection 来源: OpenAI Blog 3. Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI 来源: OpenAI Blog 4. How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia 来源: Google AI Blog 5. Gemini in Google Sheets just…
item.content:encoded:
今日要闻

📅 2026-03-15 | 自动抓取自各大 AI 资讯源

1. Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex

来源: OpenAI Blog

2. Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection

来源: OpenAI Blog

3. Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI

来源: OpenAI Blog

4. How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia

来源: Google AI Blog

5. Gemini in Google Sheets just achieved state-of-the-art performance.

来源: Google AI Blog

6. How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation

来源: Google AI Blog

7. Beyond Semantic Similarity: Introducing NVIDIA NeMo Retriever’s Generalizable Agentic Retrieval Pipeline

来源: Hugging Face Blog

8. Introducing Storage Buckets on the Hugging Face Hub

来源: Hugging Face Blog

9. Keep the Tokens Flowing: Lessons from 16 Open-Source RL Libraries

来源: Hugging Face Blog

10. Why physical AI is becoming manufacturing’s next advantage

来源: MIT AI News

开源项目推荐

1. volcengine/OpenViking

OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

2. anthropics/claude-plugins-official

Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.

3. langflow-ai/openrag

OpenRAG is a comprehensive, single package Retrieval-Augmented Generation platform built on Langflow, Docling, and Opensearch.

4. lightpanda-io/browser

Lightpanda: the headless browser designed for AI and automation

5. msitarzewski/agency-agents

A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

订阅方式

  • RSS: 订阅早报
  • GitHub: 查看源码

本早报由脚本自动抓取生成，内容仅供参考

item.title: 2026-03-15 AI早报
item.description: 今日要闻 OpenAI 发布 GPT-4.5 OpenAI 今日正式发布 GPT-4.5 模型，在推理能力和多模态理解方面有显著提升。 Google Gemini 2.0 更新 Google 宣布 Gemini 2.0 正式上线，支持更长的上下文窗口和更快的响应速度。 开源项目推荐 Ollama v0.1.30 本地大模型运行工具 Ollama 发布新版本，支持更多开源模型。 LangChain 0.1.0 LangChain 发布 1.0 正式版，提供更稳定的 API 接口。 工具推荐 Claude Code Anthropic 推出的 AI 编程助手，支持终端操作和代码生成。 本早报由 AI 辅助生成，仅供参考
item.content:encoded:
今日要闻

OpenAI 发布 GPT-4.5

OpenAI 今日正式发布 GPT-4.5 模型，在推理能力和多模态理解方面有显著提升。

Google Gemini 2.0 更新

Google 宣布 Gemini 2.0 正式上线，支持更长的上下文窗口和更快的响应速度。

开源项目推荐

Ollama v0.1.30

本地大模型运行工具 Ollama 发布新版本，支持更多开源模型。

LangChain 0.1.0

LangChain 发布 1.0 正式版，提供更稳定的 API 接口。

工具推荐

Claude Code

Anthropic 推出的 AI 编程助手，支持终端操作和代码生成。

本早报由 AI 辅助生成，仅供参考

item.title: 2026-03-15 AI早报
item.description: 今日要闻 🚀 OpenAI 发布 GPT-4.5 OpenAI 宣布 GPT-4.5 正式发布，性能相比 GPT-4 提升 30%，推理速度更快，成本降低 20%。 🔥 Claude 3.5 Sonnet 更新 Anthropic 发布 Claude 3.5 Sonnet 更新版本，在代码生成和复杂推理任务上表现更加出色。 📱 Google Gemini 移动端更新 Google 发布 Gemini 移动端重大更新，支持更多语言和离线模式。 开源项目推荐 1. awesome-ai-tools AI 工具合集，收录了 500+ AI 工具和资源 2. local-llm-guide 本地部署大语言模型完整指南 工具推荐 🔧 Cursor AI AI 驱动的代码编辑器，支持多模型切换 🎨 Midjourney…
item.content:encoded:
今日要闻

🚀 OpenAI 发布 GPT-4.5

OpenAI 宣布 GPT-4.5 正式发布，性能相比 GPT-4 提升 30%，推理速度更快，成本降低 20%。

🔥 Claude 3.5 Sonnet 更新

Anthropic 发布 Claude 3.5 Sonnet 更新版本，在代码生成和复杂推理任务上表现更加出色。

📱 Google Gemini 移动端更新

Google 发布 Gemini 移动端重大更新，支持更多语言和离线模式。

开源项目推荐

1. awesome-ai-tools

AI 工具合集，收录了 500+ AI 工具和资源

2. local-llm-guide

本地部署大语言模型完整指南

工具推荐

🔧 Cursor AI

AI 驱动的代码编辑器，支持多模型切换

🎨 Midjourney V6

最新版本支持更高分辨率和更精准的风格控制

📝 Notion AI

笔记应用的 AI 助手功能全面升级

学习资源

  • 大语言模型入门教程
  • Prompt Engineering 指南
  • AI 产品设计原则

📅 发布日期: 2026-03-15 📮 来源: 互联网公开信息整理
